Description: (Optional) A quick one-line summary of how the member or customer engaged with us. If left empty, this field is auto-populated with the service type and recipients after saving. This field is only used for making search results more readable.
The attendees or recipients of this consultation. If the PI also attended, enter them here as well.
The Primary Investigator or Co-Investigators of the study or project. Investigators do not need to be present at the time of service.
The date when either: a service was provided; a consultation meeting was held; email was received; or long-running activity started.
(Required) The name of the consultation type provided to members or other stakeholders.
If a follow up is required, this date is a reminder of when to follow up. An email reminder will be sent to the corresponding team on this date.

The fiscal year when this service was provided (7/1 - 6/30).
The year when this service was provided.
Publications, code repositories, and news articles that were a direct or indirect result of this consultation. If the center or a specific core was credited, include that information here.

Description: For grant services only: the dollar amount requested (project budget).
For grant services only: the dollar amount that was awarded, if any.

The date when the grant is received or when funding officially begins.
